title: Sub-Therapeutic Resistance Warning
description: Drinking home-brewed traditional Artemisia annua tea concurrently with standard pharmaceutical ACT tablets exposes Plasmodium strains to fluctuating, sub-therapeutic artemisinin volumes, highly accelerating the risk of drug-resistant mutations.
clinicalAdvice: Do not combine. Rely exclusively on standard pharmaceutical ACT tablet dosage schedules for active Malaria clearing. Save Artemisia teas for non-overlapping recovery stages.
